challenges.format_failures: LLaMA 3.2-1B occasionally generates malformed JSON requiring fallback regex extraction.
challenges.hallucinations: Model may invent entity boundaries for common nouns resembling names (e.g., 'Machine' in band names).
challenges.boundary_errors: Multi-token names frequently truncated or merged; email localpart/domain sometimes split incorrectly.
challenges.no_context: Without fine-tuning, model lacks domain-specific cues and relies purely on surface patterns.
challenges.rate_limits: Free tier rate limits require retry logic and reduce throughput to ~20-30 requests/minute.
